youtube_id: TBD — upload blocked by daily quota; video ready at out-spinner-r7/spinner-wheel-r7-narrated.webm

pronunciation_map.Present (verb /prəˈzent/): Use 'Hit Present to go live' — the 'to go live' context cues ElevenLabs to stress the verb form prih-ZENT, not the noun PREZ-ent

notes: AKB-15 r7 — SINGLE VOICE throughout: Alice only (Xb7hH8MSUJpSbSDYk0k2). AUDIT FIX: r6 had VO 3-6s ahead of visual for steps 1-4 (root cause: r6 recording was slower to load, old r5 timings not adjusted). r7 re-times: sw-create 3.5s (tooltip appears at 3.5s), sw-pick-type 10.5s (editor at 10.5s), sw-autofill 17.0s (spotlight at 17.0s — exact), sw-add-entries 24.5s (sequential after autofill), sw-save-entries 31.5s, sw-spin-time 36.6s, sw-present 41.7s. Visual extended with freeze frame (+12.5s) to 46.9s total. check_vo_overlap.py PASS. Drift per step: create 0s, pick-type 0s, autofill 0s (star feature exact), add-entries +2.5s late (entries already typed but still visible), save-entries/spin-time/present on freeze frame. Video: out-spinner-r7/spinner-wheel-r7-narrated.webm.

steps.display_text: Click New Presentation to start. We'll add a Spinner Wheel — AhaSlides' audience-powered live wheel that fills itself when participants scan your QR code.
steps.tts_text: Click New Presentation to start. We will add a Spinner Wheel — powered by audience autofill.

steps.display_text: Select Spinner Wheel from the slide type picker in the Quiz section.
steps.tts_text: Select Spinner Wheel from the slide type picker in the Quiz section.

steps.display_text: Check Participant name autofill in the right panel — participants scan your QR code and enter their name to join, and the wheel fills itself automatically.
steps.tts_text: Tick Participant name autofill in the right panel — scan QR, enter name to join, and the wheel fills itself.

steps.display_text: Or prefer a fixed list? Type entries one per line in the Entries field, or paste a whole list at once.
steps.tts_text: Or prefer a fixed list? Type entries one per line in the Entries field, or paste a whole list at once.

steps.display_text: Click Save — each entry appears as a coloured segment on the wheel.
steps.tts_text: Click Save — each entry appears as a coloured segment on the wheel.

steps.display_text: Use Spin time to set how long the wheel spins — up to 1,200 seconds for maximum suspense.
steps.tts_text: Spin time controls how long the wheel spins — up to twelve hundred seconds.

steps.display_text: Hit Present to go live — then press the centre of the wheel, and the winner is revealed!
steps.tts_text: Hit Present to go live — then press the centre of the wheel, and the winner is revealed!

mix_command: cd ~/AhaSlides/onboarding-videos && node_modules/ffmpeg-static/ffmpeg -y -i out-spinner-r7/spinner-wheel-r7-final.webm -i out-spinner-r7/s01_v2.mp3 -i out-spinner-r7/s02.mp3 -i out-spinner-r7/s03_v5.mp3 -i out-spinner-r7/s04.mp3 -i out-spinner-r7/s05.mp3 -i out-spinner-r7/s06.mp3 -i out-spinner-r7/s07.mp3 -filter_complex '[1:a]adelay=3500|3500[a1];[2:a]adelay=10500|10500[a2];[3:a]adelay=17000|17000[a3];[4:a]adelay=24500|24500[a4];[5:a]adelay=31500|31500[a5];[6:a]adelay=36600|36600[a6];[7:a]adelay=41700|41700[a7];[a1][a2][a3][a4][a5][a6][a7]amix=inputs=7:normalize=0[aout]' -map 0:v -map '[aout]' -c:v copy -c:a libopus -b:a 64k out-spinner-r7/spinner-wheel-r7-narrated.webm
